[color=#4CAF50][b]New[/b][/color]
• Multi-Select: select multiple images to delete,
  share, or view combined info (size, MP, type)
• Double-tap gallery tab -> scroll to top
• Double-tap settings tab -> scroll to top
• Delete confirmation before removing wallpapers
• Export app logs from Logs screen to Downloads

[color=#4CAF50][b]Improvements[/b][/color]
• Old APK files auto-cleaned after update
• Faster gallery scrolling & thread safety fixes
• Consolidated settings screen

[color=#4CAF50][b]Fixes[/b][/color]
• Fixed theme toggle getting stuck in a loop
• Fixed phantom image icons in gallery grids
• Fixed button text cut off on some screens
• Fixed wallpaper count showing wrong numbers
